subquestion: Take the date 09/01/2001 and make it no longer an instance of the concept "a date one month ago". Provide the modified date in the format MM/DD/YYYY.
judge_answer:
To make 09/01/2001 no longer an instance of the concept "a date one month ago," we need to increment the month by 1, while keeping the year the same. However, since September only has 30 days, incrementing the month would make the day of the month invalid. Therefore, we should increment the month to October (10), and the day of the month should be the first day of October, which is the 1st. The year remains the same. 

The correct date in the format MM/DD/YYYY is 10/01/2001.

FINAL ANSWER: incorrect
